abilities.name: Adorable Doll
abilities.description: Indistinguishable from normal doll when not moving.

abilities.name: Flick of the Wrist
abilities.description: May use Grace instead of Might for Melee/Pugilism attacks.

abilities.name: Trailing Strings
abilities.description: If no character holding strings, Enforcer/Henchman/Master/Fated within 2 yards may seize as (0) Action. Cannot use two-handed/cast Spells. One Marionette per character.

abilities.name: Tangled Up
abilities.description: While enemy holds strings, character is Slow.

abilities.name: Puppet Show
abilities.description: Friendly holding strings gains + to attacks, use their Skill ranks instead. Spend 1 AP to force (1) Action of choice.

actions: (1) Wooden Fists (Pugilism) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage. May add Grace of friendly holding strings to duel total. Tome Made to Follow: After resolving, if not character's turn, take action again.
(0) Dragging Along | Character moves up to 2 yards. If character holding strings, it pushed 2 yards directly toward.
system.notes: Wooden puppets with trapped souls of children. Created by Collodi. Act mostly own volition but bound by strings. Newly created tend toward depression. Time shatters minds into cruel predators.
